title: 10 best herbal teas for throat congestion
description: Eucalyptus globulus, also known as Tasmanian blue gum, teas helps with throat congestion because of its decongestant properties. The tea contains eucalyptol, a natural compound that helps to break down and clear mucus from the airways. This allows for easier breathing and alleviates discomfort caused by congestion. By reducing inflammation and promoting drainage, the tea helps to relieve coughs and sore throats, providing quick relief for those suffering from respiratory issues. Regula...
